allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-CimInstance -Namespace root/SecurityCenter2 -ClassName AntiVirusProduct | Select-Object displayName, productState, pathToSignedProductExe")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ItemProperty HKLM:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Uninstall\\*, HKLM:\\Software\\Wow6432Node\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Uninstall\\* | Where-Object { $_DisplayName -like ''*Sophos*'' } | Select-Object DisplayName, DisplayVersion, InstallLocation, Publisher")

Bash(powershell -Command "$results = Get-ItemProperty ''HKLM:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Uninstall\\*'' | Where-Object DisplayName -like ''*Sophos*''; $results | Select-Object DisplayName, DisplayVersion, InstallLocation")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ItemProperty ''HKLM:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Uninstall\\*'' | Where-Object { $_DisplayName -like ''*Sophos*'' } | Select-Object DisplayName, DisplayVersion, InstallLocation | Format-List")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object { $_Name -like ''*Sophos*'' -or $_Name -like ''*sophos*'' } | Select-Object Name, Id, Path")
Bash(cmd /c "powershell -Command ""Get-Process | Where-Object Name -like ''*Sophos*'' | Select-Object Name, Id""")

Bash(cmd /c "powershell -Command ""Get-MpComputerStatus | Select-Object AMServiceEnabled, AntispywareEnabled, AntivirusEnabled, BehaviorMonitorEnabled, IoavProtectionEnabled, NISEnabled, OnAccessProtectionEnabled, RealTimeProtectionEnabled, AntivirusSignatureLastUpdated""")

Bash(powershell.exe -NonInteractive -Command "Get-MpComputerStatus | Select-Object AMServiceEnabled, AntispywareEnabled, AntivirusEnabled, BehaviorMonitorEnabled, RealTimeProtectionEnabled, AntivirusSignatureLastUpdated | Format-List")
